SEARCH

Uses of Class
co.edu.unbosque.venta.model.Venta

Packages that use Venta
Package
Description
co.edu.unbosque.venta.controller
Package containing REST controllers for managing sale details (DetalleVenta) and related operations in the sales(Venta) management system.
co.edu.unbosque.venta.model
Package containing model classes (entities) used for the sales management system.
co.edu.unbosque.venta.repository
Package containing repository interfaces responsible for managing database access operations related to sales entities.
co.edu.unbosque.venta.service
Package containing service classes responsible for handling business logic related to sales management, including creation of sales, interaction with external services, and generation of sales reports and invoices.

  • Uses of Venta in co.edu.unbosque.venta.controller

    Methods in co.edu.unbosque.venta.controller that return types with arguments of type Venta
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Venta>
    VentaController.crear(Venta c)
    Creates a new sale (Venta).
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<Venta>>
    VentaController.mostrarTodo()
    Retrieves all sales.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<Venta>
    VentaService.buscarPorId(Long id)
    Finds a sale by its ID.

    VentaService.mostrarTodo()
    Retrieves all sales stored in the database.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    VentaService.actualizar(Long id, Venta nuevaData)
    Updates an existing sale and its detail list.
    int
    VentaService.crear(Venta o)
    Creates a new sale and calculates all financial values such as subtotal, VAT (IVA), and total.
    boolean
    VentaService.findTitleAlreadyTaken(Venta newVenta)
    Checks if a sale code already exists in the database.
